approaches.title: Descending sort and scan
approaches.summary: Sort citations in descending order, then scan the sorted values to determine the largest h-index.

revisions.commitBody:
time: O(nlogn)
space: O(n) # should have used mut and unstable sort
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial descending-sort solution using a cloned vector and explicit scanning logic.

revisions.commitComment: original approach but in idomatic rust
revisions.rawCommitSubject: 274: original approach but in idomatic rust
revisions.commitBody:
time: O(nlogn)
space: O(1)/O(logn) # heap space is constant, stack space is not due to
sorting algo used
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactored the same sorting strategy to sort the input directly with unstable sort and use an iterator-based scan.

approaches.title: Bucket counting
approaches.summary: Use citation-count buckets capped at the number of papers, then accumulate counts from high citation levels downward.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaced sorting with a linear-time bucket-counting strategy and reverse cumulative scan.
